---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe it clearly — e.g. "I find it hard to X because Y."

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see added or changed. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you tried working around this in another way? What other solutions did you consider?

## Scope & Complexity

Your estimate of the implementation effort:
- [ ] Small — a few lines of UI change
- [ ] Medium — new component or API route
- [ ] Large — new data model, major refactor, or external integration

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar implementations elsewhere, or any other relevant context.

---

> Note: This is a personal project. Feature requests are evaluated based on personal usefulness and architectural fit. High-quality PRs implementing the feature are more likely to be merged than requests alone.
